item.title: PRI releases 2026 signatory guide to impact reporting
item.description: New PRI guidance for signatories on impact reporting, aligned with OPIM and IRIS+ standards. Intended to reduce DDQ response burden for emerging managers.

item.title: Climate-aligned investing: reporting standards convergence
item.description: Update on the convergence of climate-aligned investing reporting standards across EU SFDR, US SEC climate rules, and voluntary frameworks.
